atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing right knee pain following a skiing injury two weeks ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a twisting injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hearing a pop at the time of the injury

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports wearing a brace

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using THC cream for pain relief

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing swelling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports experiencing stiffness

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports previous knee surgery at age 14

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports previous knee surgery involving reconstruction

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a history of being a competitive gymnast

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasionally participating in gym workouts

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports regular skiing (three times per week)

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physical examination reveals mild swelling and bruising on the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient demonstrates a slight limp.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited, with pain on dorsiflexion and pain on palpation of the medial aspect of the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with weight-bearing, particularly during prolonged walks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-rays demonstrate mild osteoarthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-rays demonstrate no acute fracture.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms and examination findings are most consistent with a posterior cruciate ligament strain and underlying osteoarthritis, likely exacerbated by the previous knee surgery.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am recommending physical therapy to improve strength and range of motion in the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will prescribe meloxicam 15mg once daily for pain and inflammation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will prescribe ibuprofen 800mg twice daily as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I recommend limiting skiing and strenuous gym activities for now.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow up in four weeks to assess progress or adjust treatment as needed.
